basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker and Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in/. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Anganwadi Worker: 10th Pass Anganwadi Helper: 8th Pass

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download WCD Odisha Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Odisha Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WCD Odisha Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Anganwadi Worker: 10th Pass Anganwadi Helper: 8th Pass

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Helper recruitment is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For the Anganwadi Worker post, candidates must have passed the 10th standard. For the Anganwadi Helper post, an 8th pass qualification is required.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official WCD Odisha website before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Anganwadi Worker and Helper.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for WCD Odisha Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Document Verification and the preparation of a Merit List based on qualifications and other criteria.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will lead you to the relevant download or information page.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 171 Navam-VI-08/2026.
